\tzpentry{ID11417}{Photon Frequency Redshift Drop}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
Photon frequency drops inversely with one plus redshift.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\nu_{0}=\frac{\nu_{e}}{1+z}
